method.hyperparameter_selection: fit on earliest two outer seasons; select on penultimate season only
method.holdout: last complete season untouched until final evaluation

kl_projection_audit.objective: minimum KL result-class tilt to learned 1X2 margins
kl_projection_audit.constraint_form: three 1X2 class margins plus probability conservation

challenge_gate_fail_reasons: holdout 1X2 accuracy gain below 1 percentage point

scope_correction.r1_error: current partial calendar-year seasons were admitted as untouched holdout
scope_correction.corrected_policy: only outer folds up to each domain's formal last-complete-season target
